creator: yuri@freebsd.org
text:
Currently the URL is https://gitlab.com/siesta-project/libraries/xmlf90/-/archive/1.5.5/xmlf90-1.5.5.tar.gz which allows poudriere to potentially guess and suggest new versions.
I believe the same is likely true for all tags in GitLab repositories.

What you suggest is to go back to downloading using the commit hash 166c0458750f973e2d6f86dd59738f3e3088295e, which is going backwards compared to what you described in the previous comment.

I think GitLab-based ports should be changed to using MASTER_SITES, opposite to what you are suggesting.
